summary: Comprehensive testing of 6 bug fixes/features for Intensiti digital signage completed. All backend tests (15/15) passed and frontend UI features verified working. Features: (1) Playlist scheduling respects day/month constraints including default playlist, (2) Media library shows ALL file types (images, videos, PDFs), (3) Full-width dialogs (95vw), (4) Ticker text/RSS toggles, (5) PDF slide support with page-by-page display, (6) 50/50 split slide content persistence verified.
passed_tests: --- TICKER TOGGLES (6 tests) ---
GET /api/settings returns ticker_text_enabled and ticker_rss_enabled fields
PUT /api/settings with ticker_text_enabled=false saves correctly
PUT /api/settings with ticker_text_enabled=true saves correctly
PUT /api/settings with ticker_rss_enabled=false saves correctly
PUT /api/settings with ticker_rss_enabled=true saves correctly
GET /api/display/{code} returns settings with ticker toggles
--- PLAYLIST SCHEDULING (3 tests) ---
Create playlist with schedule_days=[3] saves correctly
Display endpoint respects schedule_days constraints
Clearing schedule (empty arrays) allows playlist to display
--- PDF SLIDE SUPPORT (2 tests) ---
PDF media type='pdf' retrievable from /api/media
PDF slide with type='pdf', page_duration saves to playlist correctly
--- 50/50 SPLIT SLIDE (2 tests) ---
Split slide with split_left_type/content and split_right_type/content persists correctly
Edit split slide - changing left/right content types saves correctly
--- CONTENT TYPES (1 test) ---
All 7 content types (media, youtube, qrcode, countdown, text, rss, pdf) save to playlist
--- DEFAULT PLAYLIST SCHEDULING (1 test) ---
Default assigned playlist schedule_days/schedule_months checked by display endpoint
--- FRONTEND UI VERIFIED ---
Settings page: ticker_text_enabled toggle visible and functional
Settings page: ticker_rss_enabled toggle visible and functional
Settings page: 'Bandeau defilant (textes)' card with Actif toggle
Settings page: 'Flux RSS (bandeau defilant)' card with Actif toggle
Playlist Editor: Add slide dialog uses max-w-[95vw] - 95% viewport width verified
Playlist Editor: Edit slide dialog uses max-w-[95vw] - 95% viewport width verified
Playlist Editor: 7 content type tabs present (Media, YouTube, QR Code, Compte a rebours, Texte, Flux RSS, PDF)
Playlist Editor: PDF tab shows 'Selectionnez un PDF depuis la mediatheque' with page_duration input
Playlist Editor: 50/50 layout shows Gauche (Left) and Droite (Right) content pickers
Playlist Editor: MediaGrid label shows 'Choisir un media (images, videos, PDF)' - all types displayed
Display page: Header (72px), footer ticker (44px), main content area all visible
Display page: RSS headlines scrolling in footer ticker
seed_data_creation: Test playlists created and cleaned up automatically by pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 verified 6 features: (1) Scheduling now checks default assigned playlist AND any scheduled override playlists. Backend function playlist_matches_schedule() in /api/display/{code} checks schedule_days (0-6 Mon-Sun), schedule_months (1-12), schedule_start, schedule_end. Empty arrays = no restriction. (2) MediaGrid component shows all types (images, videos, PDFs) - label says 'images, videos, PDF'. (3) Dialog max-w-[95vw] verified at 1824px on 1920px viewport = 95%. Both add-slide-dialog and edit-slide-dialog use this. (4) ticker_text_enabled and ticker_rss_enabled in SettingsUpdate model and client_settings collection. UI has Switch toggles in card headers. (5) PDF slide type='pdf' with content.page_duration for seconds per page. PdfSlideContent component uses react-pdf with pdfjs worker from unpkg CDN. (6) Split slides store split_left_type, split_left_content, split_right_type, split_right_content. Display code: 386621. Today is weekday=1 (Tuesday).
